NVIDIA CUDA Runtime Components (Windows)

This ENGINE Windows bundle includes NVIDIA CUDA runtime libraries for GPU acceleration in the llama bridge path.

Shipped NVIDIA files in the bundle:
- cublas64_13.dll
- cublasLt64_13.dll

These files are redistributed under the NVIDIA CUDA EULA.
See: nvidia-cuda-EULA.txt

Official NVIDIA CUDA EULA page:
https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/eula/index.html

Note: End users may replace these CUDA DLLs with compatible versions installed on their own systems.
